abilities.name: Stench
abilities.description: May cause a foe to flinch.

abilities.name: Flash Fire
abilities.description: Powers up if hit by fire.

abilities.name: Overgrow
abilities.description: Ups Grass moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.description: Ups Fire moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.description: Ups Water moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Ups Bug moves in a pinch.

abilities.name: Snow Cloak
abilities.description: Ups evasion in Hail or Snow.

abilities.name: Unburden
abilities.description: Using a hold item ups Speed.

abilities.name: Slow Start
abilities.description: Takes a while to get going.

abilities.name: Ice Body
abilities.description: HP recovery in Hail or Snow.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.description: Can't be damaged by an ally.

abilities.name: Symbiosis
abilities.description: Passes its item to an ally.

abilities.name: Berserk
abilities.description: Boosts Sp. Atk at low HP.

abilities.name: Cotton Down
abilities.description: Lower Speed of all when hit.

abilities.name: Gulp Missile
abilities.description: If hit, spits prey from sea.

abilities.name: Steam Engine
abilities.description: Fire or Water hits up Speed.

abilities.name: Ice Face
abilities.description: Hail or Snow renew free hit.

abilities.name: Perish Body
abilities.description: Foe faints in 3 turns if hit.

abilities.name: Wind Rider
abilities.description: Ups Attack if hit by wind.
